definitions: 农药；杀虫剂、除草剂等用于防治害虫或杂草的化学品

examples.text: has lost its stranglehold on Latin American politics. But the modern banana industry isn’t without problems. Cavendish bananas require frequent applications of pesticides that create hazards for farmworkers and ecosystems. And though they’re resistant to the particular pathogen
examples.explanation: 这里的 pesticides 指“农药”。句子意思是：卡文迪什香蕉需要频繁施用农药，而这些农药会给农场工人和生态系统带来危害。重点可记搭配 applications of pesticides（施用农药）和 frequent applications（频繁施用）。

source.text: The dark history of bananas - John Soluri
